data.title: Fed's recent minutes indicate no hurry to resume rate cuts. Unless labor market worsens drastically or inflation dips significantly, Fed likely to maintain current rates for some time.
data.description: Unless there is a sudden decline in the job market or a notable decrease in inflation, it seems likely that the Federal Reserve will maintain its current stance for an extended period.

data.title: Cobblestone Auto Spa in Scottsdale supports families of pilot Robert Bruce Skankey and Trooper Hunter R. Bennett. Fundraiser on Feb 20, 7 AM-3 PM at the location: 15816 North Pima Road, Scottsdale, AZ 85260.
data.description: Cobblestone Auto Spa in Scottsdale, Arizona, is hosting a fundraising event to aid the families of Pilot Robert Bruce Skankey and State Trooper/Paramedic Hunter R. Bennett. The event will be held at the Scottsdale – Hayden & Frank Lloyd Wright branch on February 20, from 7 AM to 3 PM, located at 15816 North Pima Road. All proceeds raised at this specific location during this event will go directly to supporting the families of the fallen individuals.

data.title: Dewberry appoints new CEO David J. Mahoney, will lead $763M, 2,500-person firm. Effective April 1, 2026.
data.description: Effective April 1, 2026, Mahoney will assume leadership of a firm valued at $763 million and employing 2,500 individuals. Based in FAIRFAX, Va., Dewberry is a privately held professional services company renowned for its client service to public- and private-sector clients in the built and natural environments.

data.title: Teck Resources Limited declared an eligible dividend of $0.125/share on Class A and B shares, payable on March 31, 2026.
data.description: Teck Resources Limited, based in Vancouver, British Columbia, revealed that the Board of Directors decided to issue an eligible dividend of $0.125 for each share of its Class A common shares and Class B subordinate voting shares. The dividend will be distributed on March 31, 2026, to shareholders registered as of the market closing on March 13, 2026. Teck Resources Limited's stock trades on the TSX under the symbols TECK.A and TECK.B, as well as on the NYSE under the symbol TECK.

data.title: Life Time's new CTR athletic reformer class is in high demand, becoming the most waitlisted class in company history. (count: 114)
data.description: The leading provider of traditional Pilates in the nation has combined years of experience with modern innovation, resulting in their new CTR athletic reformer class becoming the most popular class in the company's history. Situated in CHANHASSEN, Minn., the class has garnered an extensive waitlist. This development occurred on Feb. 18, 2026, marking a significant milestone for the company as Pilates and reformer-based exercises continue to flourish, attracting a growing number of participants.

data.title: Performance Brokerage Services facilitates sale of South Star JCB, two locations in Dallas-Fort Worth, Texas on Feb. 18, 2026.
data.description: Renowned dealership brokerage firm, Performance Brokerage Services, has recently facilitated the sale of South Star JCB, comprising of two Dallas-Fort Worth, Texas locations. This transaction took place on February 18, 2026, in Irvine, California. Performance Brokerage Services is recognized as the leader in dealership buy-sell activity in North America, handling a high volume of such transactions.

data.title: NAIC adopts strategic priorities for 2026, focusing on leadership and modernization in response to changing risk landscape.
data.description: On February 18, 2026, in Washington, the National Association of Insurance Commissioners (NAIC) announced their strategic priorities for the year. With 56 Members at the forefront, the NAIC is responding to changes in the insurance sector and risk environment. The proactive approach aims to address the evolving landscape, emphasizing forward-thinking strategies. This move indicates a shift towards adapting to market trends and potential challenges.

data.title: Reggaetón duo Luny Tunes honored with BMI President's Award in 2026 BMI Latin Awards; Elena Rose to receive BMI Impact Award. Event on March 19 in Miami.
data.description: Elena Rose is set to be honored with the prestigious BMI Impact Award alongside celebrating the top Latin songwriters and publishers on Thursday, March 19 in Miami. The event, taking place in Los Angeles on Feb. 18, 2026, will also recognize Luny Tunes with the BMI President's Award.

data.title: BGL sells Western Botanicals to The Riverside Company, a vitamins, minerals, & supplements CDMO. Feb. 18, 2026.
data.description: A contract development and manufacturing organization specializing in vitamins, minerals, and supplements is experiencing rapid growth. On February 18, 2026, Brown Gibbons Lang & Company (BGL), a top independent investment bank, disclosed the sale of Western...

data.title: Ergatta partners with Interactive Strength Inc., expanding its reach in game-based fitness with Wattbike, CLMBR, and FORME.
data.description: On February 18, 2026, Ergatta, a leader in game-based connected fitness, revealed that it has finalized a deal to become a part of Interactive Strength Inc., which encompasses a range of performance-oriented fitness labels such as Wattbike, CLMBR, and FORME. This collaboration signifies a significant development in the fitness industry landscape.

data.title: DerivaDEX unveils Bermuda-licensed derivatives exchange, offering crypto perpetual swaps under DAO governance.
data.description: Following approval from Bermuda’s regulator, a decentralized exchange is now offering crypto perpetual swaps under DAO governance. The exchange obtained a test license to operate, with formal oversight in place. This move signifies a shift towards embracing decentralized trading platforms, with the exchange aiming to provide users with access to perpetual swaps involving cryptocurrencies. This development underscores the growing trend towards decentralized finance, highlighting the market's push for innovation and regulatory compliance. The exchange's move to offer crypto perpetual swaps marks a significant milestone, showcasing its commitment to offering diverse trading options to users in the rapidly evolving crypto market.

data.title: Curinos opens applications for second year of FinTech Incubator after successful 2025 cohort. Focus on decision intelligence, finance process innovation, and financial inclusion. Applications open for 2026 cohort.
data.description: Curinos, a company based in New York, has announced that they are currently accepting applications for their 2026 cohort program. This program is dedicated to addressing critical issues in consumer and business financial services, with a specific focus on decision intelligence, finance process and workflow innovation, and financial inclusion. Interested individuals and businesses can now apply to be a part of this initiative.

data.title: a21 acquires equity stake in Two12, forming strategic partnership to connect culinary talent with global platforms.
data.description: In a significant move, a21 has acquired a stake in Two12, a management company supported by Paradigm Talent Agency. This collaboration aims to bridge world-class culinary talent with premium live experiences and brand partnerships on a larger scale. The partnership is set to redefine the culinary industry landscape. The deal, finalized on Feb. 18, 2026, showcases a21's commitment to expanding its presence in the culinary sphere. This strategic alliance is expected to unlock new opportunities for culinary talents and enhance brand partnerships, creating a new paradigm in the industry.
